name: Climbing
entries: While you're climbing, each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot (2 extra feet in {@variantrule Difficult Terrain|XPHB|difficult terrain}). You ignore this extra cost if you have a {@variantrule Climb Speed|XPHB} and use it to climb. At the DM's option, climbing a slippery surface or one with few handholds might require a successful {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics|XPHB}) check.
